meaning: Imperial Chemical Industries Ltd  英国化学工业公司
examples: The using result is good as reflected by ICI PU Company.
National has its headquarters in Bridgewater, NJ, and is a member of the ICI Group.
As it moved upmarket, ICI became progressively less imperial, less chemical and less industrial.
The SEC allowed mutual fund money managers to pay their ICI lobbyist dues with investor funds.
No piece of mutual fund regulation was ever implemented by the Commission without significant ICI input.
